dashboard.noProductsDesc: Start with a barcode scan or add your first item manually.

products.title: Inventory
products.confirmDelete: Really delete this item? This cannot be undone.

consume.title: Withdraw quantity
consume.archiveWarning: Entire stock will be withdrawn — item will be archived.

form.isoHint: Relevant standards for this category will be displayed automatically.

scanner.title: Scan barcode
scanner.description: Point camera at the barcode — you will be redirected to the form automatically.
scanner.fifoHint: This barcode already exists. Please choose a different storage location so that older stock is used first.
scanner.cameraNoAccess: No camera access. Please allow it in your browser settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.installDescription: Install MHD Inventory as an app for faster access and offline use.
settings.installTip: Tip: In Chrome/Edge, an install icon also appears in the address bar.
settings.notifSchedule: You will be notified 30, 14, 7, 3 and 1 day before expiry.
settings.locationInUse: "{{name}}" is still used by {{count}} active item(s) and cannot be deleted.
settings.manageCategoriesDesc: Built-in categories and custom categories with unit and consumption amount.
settings.categoryInUse: "{{name}}" is still used by {{count}} item(s) and cannot be deleted.
settings.supportDesc: MHD Inventory is a professional expiry management solution. For questions, please contact your representative.
settings.impressumResponsible: Responsible for content according to § 55 Abs. 2 RStV:
settings.impressumDisclaimerText: The content of this application was created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness and timeliness of the content. The displayed ISO and DIN standards serve as guidance and do not replace the user's obligation to independently verify applicable regulations. Use is at your own risk.
settings.privacyDataProcessingText: MHD Inventory stores all data exclusively on your device (IndexedDB in the browser). No personal data is transmitted to servers or stored in a cloud.
settings.privacyExternalServicesText: MHD Inventory does not contact any external servers. All data is processed and stored exclusively on your device.
settings.privacyNoExternalServices: MHD Inventory does not contact any external servers. The barcode scanner works completely offline. All data stays on your device.
settings.privacyNotificationsText: When notifications are enabled, they are generated locally on your device. No push tokens or data are sent to external servers.
settings.privacyCookiesText: MHD Inventory uses no cookies, no tracking, no analytics and no advertising. No data is shared with third parties.
settings.privacyRightsText: Since all data is stored locally, you have full control at all times. You can back up your data using the export function and completely remove it via your browser settings (clear website data).
settings.termsScopeText: These terms apply to the use of the application "MHD Inventory". By using the application, you accept these conditions.
settings.termsServiceText: MHD Inventory is a professional Progressive Web App for managing expiry dates and stock levels. The application works offline and stores all data locally on the user's device.
settings.termsAvailabilityText: There is no entitlement to constant availability. The application may be changed or discontinued at any time without notice.
settings.termsLiabilityText: Use is at your own risk. The provider is not liable for damages resulting from the use of the application. The displayed standards and warnings are non-binding and do not replace professional advice. Regular backups are recommended.
settings.termsIPText: All rights to the application belong to the provider. Use is only permitted within the scope of the acquired license.
settings.termsDonationsText: Use requires a valid license. The scope of the license is determined by the respective agreement.
settings.appSlogan: Deadlines under control. Stock at a glance.
settings.installError:
The installation could not be started automatically.

To install MHD Inventory manually:
1. Chrome/Edge: Click the install icon in the address bar (or Menu > Install app)
2. Safari (iOS): Tap Share > Add to Home Screen
3. Firefox: Menu > Install site

offline.banner: Offline — all data is available locally

pwa.installDesc: Install MHD Inventory on your device for faster access and offline use.

error.title: An error occurred
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Your data is safe.

notifications.expiredBody: The item "{{name}}" at location "{{location}}" has expired.

imageErrors.tooLarge: Image is too large (max. 10 MB). Please choose a smaller image.

dbErrors.invalidJson: Invalid JSON file. Please choose a valid backup file.
dbErrors.invalidFormat: Invalid import format: No items found.

isoNorms.disclaimer: The displayed standards serve as guidance and do not replace the obligation to independently verify applicable regulations.
